item.title: US says to escort ships in Strait of Hormuz ‘soon’
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The US Navy is expected to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz to avoid disruption of global oil supplies.
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Venezuela’s inflation hit 475% in 2025, the world’s highest level
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The spike was driven by a tightening of US sanctions in the lead-up to the ouster of leader Nicolas Maduro.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), sanctions(+2), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Anthropic vows court fight in Pentagon row
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
CEO Dario Amodei says the company has no choice but to challenge in court the Pentagon's formal designation of the AI firm as a risk to US national security.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Most Asian equities drop as Mideast crisis rages, though oil dips
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are wondering when the US-Israel war on Iran and Tehran's attacks across the Gulf region will end.

item.title: Pentagon formally designates Anthropic as supply-chain risk
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
It is the first time a US company has received the 'supply-chain risk' designation, previously reserved for firms from adversary countries such as China’s Huawei.
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Wall Street closes down as oil prices spike on Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
US oil rises 8% to highest since July 2024 amid Middle East conflict, stoking inflation concerns.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: India to push ahead with Russian oil imports
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The US temporarily eased economic sanctions against Russia on Thursday to allow Russian oil stranded at sea to be sold to India.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Middle East developments set to sway US stocks
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Investors are balancing the historic tendency for equities to rebound after major global developments against a lack of clarity about the Iran situation.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3)

item.title: Wealthy Asians move Dubai assets amid Iran war fears
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Affluent Asians are moving their Dubai-parked assets to the regional financial hubs of Singapore and Hong Kong as the US-Israel war on Iran clouds the Gulf's safe-haven aura.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US treasury secretary hints at lifting more Russian oil sanctions
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
This came a day after Washington temporarily authorised India to buy from Moscow as global oil prices surged.
Matched: war(+3), sanctions(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Only 9 commercial ships detected crossing Hormuz Strait since Monday
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Attacks since Sunday have multiplied against ships navigating Hormuz, raising concerns about a lasting impact on the global economy.
Matched: war(+3), sanctions(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Oil prices surge as Mideast war rages, stocks fall on US jobs
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The international benchmark oil contract, Brent North Sea crude, surged to US$92.69 per barrel, up 8.5% for the day and nearly 30% for the week.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US govt denies refunds on Trump’s illegal tariffs
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
The customs officials are denying companies' requests to recover duties imposed under emergency powers invoked by US President Donald Trump.
Matched: policy(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)
